conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Trying to land on a name for the startup, top three are Lumen, Northbeam, and Fieldstone.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Lumen sounds clean but there are already a couple of companies using something close to it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Fieldstone has a nice grounded feel to it, fits the brand direction we're going for.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to renew my car registration this week.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Northbeam tested well with a few people we showed it to, easy to say and remember.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got the registration renewed, took way less time than expected at the office.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Checked domain availability and Northbeam was the only one of the three with the .com actually free.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Fieldstone's domain would need a workaround like adding 'hq' or something to the name.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My cousin asked me to help him move apartments next weekend.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Lumen is basically out at this point given the naming conflicts we found.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: We're going with Northbeam. It was the only one with the domain available, and it tested well with people outside the company too.

query: What name did they decide on for the startup?

answer_contains: only one with the domain available
